SEARCH

Serialized Form

  • Package model

    • Class model.Album

      class Album extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • name
          String name
          The name of the album (unique per user)
        • photos
          ArrayList<Photo> photos
          The list of photos in this album

    • Class model.Photo

      class Photo extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • caption
          String caption
          The caption associated with the photo.
        • date
          LocalDateTime date
          The date and time the photo was taken (based on last time the file was modified).
        • filePath
          String filePath
          The path to the user's local photo file.
        • tags
          ArrayList<Tag> tags
          List of this photo's tags.

    • Class model.Tag

      class Tag extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • name
          String name
          The tag's name (e.g., "person", "location").
        • value
          String value
          The tag's value (e.g., "susan", "prague").

    • Class model.User

      class User extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • albums
          ArrayList<Album> albums
          All albums that belong to this user
        • username
          String username
          Unique username for this user
